title: Sociology Master Program Application and Fees
content:
Sociology Master Program Application and Fees

2025-2026 Fall Semester Online Applications will start on 02.06.2025.

Application Deadline: 18.07.2025, Sunday

Online Pre-Registration Link is below:

https://sis.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ina_app/login.aspx

PROGRAM FEES:

https://international.uskudar.edu.tr/en/tuition-fee

ALES Score Type: VERBAL

FOR 2025-2026 FALL ADMISSIONS, THERE WILL NOT BE AN ENTRANCE EXAM.

In order to apply to the program, candidates must have taken the ALES exam and received at least 55 points from the VERBAL score type.

Students who will be accepted to the program will be selected as a result of the calculation to be made by taking 65% of the VERBAL ALES score and 35% of the undergraduate graduation grade point average converted to the 100-point system.

Lessons in this program are held in the evening hours on weekdays.
